notes: Design-only per instructions; no benchmark/generation runs executed. Suite = 4 classes x 3 tasks, all deterministically gradeable (0 blind grader, target met). RQ3 headline A/B (calibrated vs inheritance@xhigh vs uniform-high) is COMPUTED from the same matrix cells -- no extra runs. All est $ are API-price equivalents; real runs consume the user's subscription plan. Engineer can build bench/effort.py directly against Section 9 schemas + bench/tasks/*.json without inventing content. ABORT criteria + fallback routes (settings-file / CLAUDE_CODE_EXTRA_BODY output_config.effort) specced if Phase 0 fails.
